    Index

    A B C D H I L M N O P Q R S T U W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    A

    AD_RECORD_DEVICE_IDENTIFIER - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Ad record type: device identifier (6-byte string).
    AD_RECORD_PRODUCT_INFO - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Ad record type: product ID, HW major/minor, FW major/minor.
    AD_RECORD_SECURITY_STATUS - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Ad record type: security status.
    AD_RECORD_THERMAL_PROTECTION - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Ad record type: thermal protection status.
    AD_RECORD_VOLTAGE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Ad record type: voltage measurement (12-bit ADC + 4-bit channel).
    ADC_CHANNEL_BATTERY - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    ADC channel: battery voltage.
    ADC_CHANNEL_TEMPERATURE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    ADC channel: internal temperature.
    ADC_TEMPERATURE_DIVISOR - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Divisor for converting raw ADC temperature reading to degrees Celsius.
    ADC_TEMPERATURE_OFFSET - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Offset subtracted after dividing to yield temperature in degrees Celsius.
    ADC_VOLTAGE_DIVISOR - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Divisor for the battery voltage formula.
    ADC_VOLTAGE_MULTIPLIER - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Multiplier for converting a raw ADC battery reading to volts.
    APPLICATION_CCCD_HANDLE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Client Characteristic Configuration Descriptor (CCCD) handle for enabling Application notifications.
    APPLICATION_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Application characteristic (short UUID 0x2901) — Write + Notify.
    APPLICATION_DATA_HANDLE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Application Data Descriptor handle.
    APPLICATION_DATA_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Application Data Descriptor UUID (short 16-bit: 0x92D1).
    APPLICATION_SERVICE_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Application Service UUID.
    APPLICATION_SERVICE_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Application Service UUID (128-bit).

    B

    BATTERY_QUERY_COMMAND - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    ASCII byte to write to TX in order to request the battery voltage.
    BATTERY_VOLTAGE_BASE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Battery voltage base (volts).
    BATTERY_VOLTAGE_BASE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Battery voltage base (volts).
    BATTERY_VOLTAGE_STEP - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Battery voltage step per ADC unit (volts).
    BATTERY_VOLTAGE_STEP - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Battery voltage step per ADC unit (volts).
    BleConnection - Interface in ch.varani.lego.ble.api
    Represents an active BLE connection to a peripheral.
    BleDevice - Interface in ch.varani.lego.ble.api
    Represents a discovered BLE peripheral that has not yet been connected.
    BleException - Exception Class in ch.varani.lego.ble.api
    Signals that a BLE operation has failed.
    BleException(String) - Constructor for exception class ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleException
    Constructs a new BleException with the given message and no cause.
    BleException(String, Throwable) - Constructor for exception class ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleException
    Constructs a new BleException with the given message and cause.
    BleScanner - Interface in ch.varani.lego.ble.api
    Scans for nearby BLE peripherals.
    BleScannerFactory - Class in ch.varani.lego.ble.api
    Factory that creates a platform-appropriate BleScanner instance.
    BOOTLOADER_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Bootloader characteristic (short UUID 0x8000) — Write + Notify.
    BOOTLOADER_DATA_HANDLE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Bootloader Data Descriptor handle.
    BOOTLOADER_DATA_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Bootloader Data Descriptor UUID (short 16-bit: 0x0001).
    BOOTLOADER_SERVICE_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Bootloader Service UUID.
    BuWizz2ProtocolConstants - Class in ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz
    Constants for the BuWizz 2.0 BLE protocol (API version 1.3).
    BuWizz3ProtocolConstants - Class in ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz
    Constants for the BuWizz 3.0 BLE protocol (API version 3.22).

    C

    ch.varani.lego.ble.api - package ch.varani.lego.ble.api
    Public API for the Bluetooth LE library for LEGO Powered Up and compatible devices.
    ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz - package ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz
    Internal package — not part of the public API.
    ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes - package ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes
    Internal package — not part of the public API.
    ch.varani.lego.ble.device.fxbricks - package ch.varani.lego.ble.device.fxbricks
    Internal package — not part of the public API.
    ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego - package ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego
    Internal package — not part of the public API.
    ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick - package ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick
    Internal package — not part of the public API.
    ch.varani.lego.ble.impl.macos - package ch.varani.lego.ble.impl.macos
     
    ch.varani.lego.ble.util - package ch.varani.lego.ble.util
     
    CHANNEL_A - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    Channel A motor letter (ASCII 'a').
    CHANNEL_A - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Channel A (port index 0x00).
    CHANNEL_B - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    Channel B motor letter (ASCII 'b').
    CHANNEL_B - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Channel B (port index 0x02).
    CHANNEL_C - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    Channel C motor letter (ASCII 'c').
    CHANNEL_C - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Channel C (port index 0x01).
    CHANNEL_D - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Channel D (port index 0x03).
    CircuitCubesProtocolConstants - Class in ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes
    Constants for the Circuit Cubes (Tenka) BLE motor control protocol.
    close() - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleConnection
    Convenience method that calls BleConnection.disconnect() and blocks until it completes, to satisfy the AutoCloseable contract for try-with-resources usage.
    close() - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleScanner
    Stops any active scan and releases all platform resources held by this scanner.
    close() - Method in class ch.varani.lego.ble.impl.macos.MacOsBleScanner
    Stops any active scan and releases all platform resources held by this scanner.
    CMD_ACTIVATE_SHELF_MODE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Activate Shelf Mode (battery disconnect).
    CMD_BRAKE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Command ID: Brake one or more channels.
    CMD_CHECK_CHARGER_SETTINGS - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Check Charger Settings.
    CMD_DRIVE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Command ID: Drive one or more channels.
    CMD_ENABLE_PID_REPORTING - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Enable PID Controller State Reporting.
    CMD_GET_WATCHDOG - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Command ID: Get watchdog timeout.
    CMD_QUERY_ADC - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Command ID: Query ADC channel.
    CMD_READ_ACCEL_CALIBRATION - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Read Accelerometer Calibration Data.
    CMD_SET_ACCEL_CALIBRATION - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Accelerometer Calibration Data.
    CMD_SET_ACCEL_LPF - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Accelerometer Low-Pass Filter.
    CMD_SET_CURRENT_LIMITS - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Current Limits.
    CMD_SET_CURRENT_LIMITS - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Current Limits.
    CMD_SET_DATA_PERIOD - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Data Transfer Period.
    CMD_SET_DEVICE_NAME - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Device Name.
    CMD_SET_LED_STATUS - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set LED Status.
    CMD_SET_MOTION_WAKE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Enable / Disable Motion Wake-Up.
    CMD_SET_MOTOR_DATA - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Motor Data.
    CMD_SET_MOTOR_DATA - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Motor Data (simple 6-channel PWM).
    CMD_SET_MOTOR_DATA_EXTENDED - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Motor Data (extended, PU-aware, 4 PU ports + 2 PWM).
    CMD_SET_MOTOR_RAMP - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Motor Ramp-Up / Ramp-Down Rates.
    CMD_SET_MOTOR_TIMEOUT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Motor Timeout Configuration.
    CMD_SET_POWER_LEVEL - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Power Level.
    CMD_SET_PU_PORT_FUNCTION - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set PU Port Function.
    CMD_SET_SERVO_PID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Servo PID Parameters.
    CMD_SET_SERVO_REFERENCE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Set Servo Reference Input.
    CMD_SET_WATCHDOG - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: Activate Connection Watchdog.
    CMD_SET_WATCHDOG - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Command ID: Set watchdog timeout.
    CMD_STATUS_REPORT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Command byte for the Device Status Report notification.
    CMD_STATUS_REPORT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte for the Device Status Report notification.
    CMD_UART_BAUD_RATE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Command byte: UART Baud Rate Setup.
    CMD_UART_BAUD_RATE_SET - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Sub-command for BuWizz3ProtocolConstants.CMD_UART_BAUD_RATE: set baud rate.
    connect() - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleDevice
    Initiates a connection to this peripheral.
    create() - Static method in class ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleScannerFactory
    Creates and returns a new BleScanner backed by the platform BLE stack appropriate for the current operating system.

    D

    device() - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleConnection
    Returns the device this connection belongs to.
    DEVICE_2PORT_HANDSET - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Device: 2-Port Handset (SSS=010, DDDDD=00010).
    DEVICE_2PORT_HUB - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Device: 2-Port Hub (SSS=010, DDDDD=00001).
    DEVICE_BOOST_HUB - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Device: Boost Move Hub (SSS=010, DDDDD=00000).
    DEVICE_DUPLO_TRAIN - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Device: Duplo Train (SSS=001, DDDDD=00000).
    DEVICE_NAME - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Advertised BLE device name.
    DEVICE_NAME - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Default advertised BLE device name (user-customisable via command 0x20).
    DEVICE_NAME - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    Advertised BLE device name for Circuit Cubes.
    DEVICE_WEDO2_HUB - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Device: WeDo 2.0 Hub (SSS=000, DDDDD=00000).
    DIRECTION_CLOCKWISE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Direction: clockwise.
    DIRECTION_COUNTER_CLOCKWISE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Direction: counter-clockwise.
    disconnect() - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleConnection
    Disconnects from the peripheral and releases all associated resources.

    H

    HUB_ACTION_DISCONNECT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub action: Disconnect.
    HUB_ACTION_SWITCH_OFF - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub action: Switch off hub.
    HUB_ACTION_VCC_PORT_OFF - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub action: VCC port control off.
    HUB_ACTION_VCC_PORT_ON - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub action: VCC port control on.
    HUB_ACTION_WILL_DISCONNECT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub action (upstream): hub will disconnect.
    HUB_ACTION_WILL_GO_BOOT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub action (upstream): hub will go into boot mode.
    HUB_ACTION_WILL_SWITCH_OFF - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub action (upstream): hub will switch off.
    HUB_ALERT_HIGH_CURRENT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Alert type: High current.
    HUB_ALERT_LOW_SIGNAL - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Alert type: Low signal strength.
    HUB_ALERT_LOW_VOLTAGE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Alert type: Low voltage.
    HUB_ALERT_OP_DISABLE_UPDATES - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Alert operation: Disable updates.
    HUB_ALERT_OP_ENABLE_UPDATES - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Alert operation: Enable updates.
    HUB_ALERT_OP_REQUEST_UPDATE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Alert operation: Request update.
    HUB_ALERT_OP_UPDATE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Alert operation: Update notification (upstream, 1-byte payload).
    HUB_ALERT_OVER_POWER - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Alert type: Over power condition.
    HUB_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    128-bit UUID of the LEGO Hub GATT characteristic.
    HUB_ID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub ID field value — always 0x00 (reserved).
    HUB_PROP_ADVERTISING_NAME - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub property: Advertising Name.
    HUB_PROP_BATTERY_TYPE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub property: Battery Type.
    HUB_PROP_BATTERY_VOLTAGE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub property: Battery Voltage (%).
    HUB_PROP_BUTTON - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub property: Button state.
    HUB_PROP_FW_VERSION - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub property: Firmware Version.
    HUB_PROP_HW_VERSION - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub property: Hardware Version.
    HUB_PROP_OP_DISABLE_UPDATES - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Property operation: Disable updates (unsubscribe).
    HUB_PROP_OP_ENABLE_UPDATES - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Property operation: Enable updates (subscribe).
    HUB_PROP_OP_REQUEST_UPDATE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Property operation: Request current value.
    HUB_PROP_OP_RESET - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Property operation: Reset to default.
    HUB_PROP_OP_SET - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Property operation: Set value.
    HUB_PROP_OP_UPDATE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Property operation: Value update notification (upstream).
    HUB_PROP_PRIMARY_MAC - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub property: Primary MAC Address.
    HUB_PROP_RSSI - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub property: RSSI.
    HUB_PROP_SYSTEM_TYPE_ID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub property: System Type ID.
    HUB_SERVICE_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    128-bit UUID of the LEGO Hub GATT service.

    I

    id() - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleDevice
    Returns the platform-specific peripheral identifier.
    isScanning() - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleScanner
    Returns true if a scan is currently running.
    isScanning() - Method in class ch.varani.lego.ble.impl.macos.MacOsBleScanner
    Returns true if a scan is currently running.

    L

    LegoProtocolConstants - Class in ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego
    Constants for the LEGO Wireless Protocol 3.0 (LWP3).
    LENGTH_TWO_BYTE_FLAG - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Bit mask applied to the first length byte to detect two-byte encoding.
    load(String) - Static method in class ch.varani.lego.ble.util.NativeLibraryLoader
    Loads the native shared library with the given base name.

    M

    MacOsBleScanner - Class in ch.varani.lego.ble.impl.macos
    macOS implementation of BleScanner backed by CoreBluetooth via JNI.
    MacOsBleScanner() - Constructor for class ch.varani.lego.ble.impl.macos.MacOsBleScanner
    Constructs a MacOsBleScanner by loading the native library and initialising the CoreBluetooth central manager.
    MAGNITUDE_MAX - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    Maximum magnitude value (full speed).
    MAGNITUDE_MIN_NONZERO - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    Minimum non-zero magnitude value.
    MAGNITUDE_STOP - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    Magnitude value that represents a stopped motor.
    MANUFACTURER_DATA_LENGTH - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Manufacturer data length in bytes.
    MANUFACTURER_DATA_LENGTH - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Manufacturer data length in bytes.
    MANUFACTURER_DATA_LENGTH - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Length of the manufacturer-specific advertisement data payload in bytes.
    MANUFACTURER_ID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    BLE manufacturer ID for LEGO System A/S (little-endian: 0x0397).
    MANUFACTURER_ID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    BLE manufacturer company ID for Vengit Limited (little-endian: 0x0198).
    MAX_BOOTLOADER_PACKET_SIZE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Maximum packet size in bytes for bootloader commands.
    MAX_INTERNAL_VELOCITY - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    Maximum internal velocity (absolute value), used when encoding magnitudes.
    MAX_PACKET_SIZE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Maximum packet size in bytes for application commands.
    MAX_PACKET_SIZE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Maximum packet size in bytes for application commands.
    MFGR_APPLICATION_PREFIX - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Manufacturer data prefix byte indicating Application mode.
    MFGR_BOOTLOADER_PREFIX - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Manufacturer data prefix byte indicating Bootloader mode.
    MOTOR_CMD_GOTO_ABSOLUTE_POSITION - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Motor sub-command: GotoAbsolutePosition.
    MOTOR_CMD_GOTO_ABSOLUTE_POSITION2 - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Motor sub-command: GotoAbsolutePosition2.
    MOTOR_CMD_SET_ACC_TIME - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Motor sub-command: SetAccTime (acceleration ramp time).
    MOTOR_CMD_SET_DEC_TIME - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Motor sub-command: SetDecTime (deceleration ramp time).
    MOTOR_CMD_START_SPEED - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Motor sub-command: StartSpeed.
    MOTOR_CMD_START_SPEED_FOR_DEGREES - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Motor sub-command: StartSpeedForDegrees.
    MOTOR_CMD_START_SPEED_FOR_DEGREES2 - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Motor sub-command: StartSpeedForDegrees2.
    MOTOR_CMD_START_SPEED_FOR_TIME - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Motor sub-command: StartSpeedForTime.
    MOTOR_CMD_START_SPEED_FOR_TIME2 - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Motor sub-command: StartSpeedForTime2.
    MOTOR_CMD_START_SPEED2 - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Motor sub-command: StartSpeed2 (two synchronised motors).
    MOTOR_CMD_WRITE_DIRECT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Motor sub-command: WriteDirect.
    MOTOR_CMD_WRITE_DIRECT_MODE_DATA - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Motor sub-command: WriteDirectModeData.
    MOTOR_CURRENT_SCALE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Motor current scale factor (amperes per ADC unit).
    MOTOR_CURRENT_SCALE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Motor current scale factor (amperes per ADC unit).
    MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_FORWARD - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Motor speed: full forward (127).
    MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_FORWARD - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Motor speed: full forward (127).
    MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_REVERSE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Motor speed: full reverse (−127).
    MOTOR_SPEED_FULL_REVERSE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Motor speed: full reverse (−127).
    MOTOR_SPEED_STOP - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Motor speed: stop.
    MOTOR_SPEED_STOP - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Motor speed: stop.
    MSG_FW_LOCK_STATUS - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Firmware Lock Status notification (upstream only).
    MSG_FW_UPDATE_GO_BOOT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Firmware Update — Go Into Boot Mode (downstream only).
    MSG_FW_UPDATE_LOCK_MEMORY - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Firmware Update Lock Memory (downstream only).
    MSG_FW_UPDATE_LOCK_STATUS_REQUEST - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Firmware Update Lock Status Request (downstream only).
    MSG_GENERIC_ERROR - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Generic Error message (upstream only).
    MSG_HUB_ACTIONS - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub Actions message (bidirectional).
    MSG_HUB_ALERTS - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub Alerts message (bidirectional).
    MSG_HUB_ATTACHED_IO - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub Attached I/O notification (upstream only).
    MSG_HUB_PROPERTIES - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hub Properties message (bidirectional).
    MSG_HW_NETWORK_COMMANDS - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Hardware Network Commands (bidirectional).
    MSG_PORT_INFO - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Port Information notification (upstream only).
    MSG_PORT_INFO_REQUEST - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Port Information Request (downstream only).
    MSG_PORT_INPUT_FORMAT_COMBINED - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Port Input Format — combined mode (upstream only).
    MSG_PORT_INPUT_FORMAT_SETUP_COMBINED - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Port Input Format Setup — combined mode (downstream only).
    MSG_PORT_INPUT_FORMAT_SETUP_SINGLE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Port Input Format Setup — single mode (downstream only).
    MSG_PORT_INPUT_FORMAT_SINGLE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Port Input Format — single mode (upstream only).
    MSG_PORT_MODE_INFO - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Port Mode Information notification (upstream only).
    MSG_PORT_MODE_INFO_REQUEST - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Port Mode Information Request (downstream only).
    MSG_PORT_OUTPUT_COMMAND - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Port Output Command (downstream only).
    MSG_PORT_OUTPUT_COMMAND_FEEDBACK - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Port Output Command Feedback (upstream only).
    MSG_PORT_VALUE_COMBINED - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Port Value — combined mode (upstream only).
    MSG_PORT_VALUE_SINGLE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Port Value — single mode (upstream only).
    MSG_VIRTUAL_PORT_SETUP - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.lego.LegoProtocolConstants
    Virtual Port Setup (downstream only).

    N

    name() - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleDevice
    Returns the advertised device name, or an empty string if the device did not include a Local Name AD structure in its advertisement.
    NativeLibraryLoader - Class in ch.varani.lego.ble.util
    Extracts the platform-appropriate native shared library from the JAR and loads it into the current JVM process via System.load(String)RESTRICTED.
    notifications(String, String) - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleConnection
    Subscribes to notifications from the specified GATT characteristic.
    NUS_SERVICE_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    UUID of the Nordic UART Service (NUS) used by Circuit Cubes.

    O

    onDeviceFound(BleDevice) - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.ScanCallback
    Called each time a BLE peripheral is discovered or its advertisement data is updated.
    OTA_CONTROL_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    UUID of the OTA Control characteristic (write 0x03 to reboot into DFU).
    OTA_DATA_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    UUID of the OTA Data characteristic (write 20- or 55-byte chunks).
    OTA_SERVICE_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    UUID of the OTA Firmware Update GATT service.
    OUTPUT_VOLTAGE_BASE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Output (motor) voltage base (volts).
    OUTPUT_VOLTAGE_STEP - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Output voltage step per ADC unit (volts).

    P

    PID_SAMPLE_PERIOD_S - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    PID controller sample period in seconds (1.0 / PID_SAMPLE_RATE_HZ).
    PID_SAMPLE_RATE_HZ - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    PID controller sample rate in Hz.
    POWER_LEVEL_DISABLED - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Power level: disabled (motors off).
    POWER_LEVEL_FAST - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Power level: Fast.
    POWER_LEVEL_LDCRS - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Power level: LDCRS (low-distortion current regulation).
    POWER_LEVEL_NORMAL - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Power level: Normal.
    POWER_LEVEL_SLOW - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Power level: Slow.
    PU_FUNCTION_GENERIC_PWM - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    PU port function: Generic PWM.
    PU_FUNCTION_PU_ABS_POSITION_SERVO - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    PU port function: PU absolute position servo.
    PU_FUNCTION_PU_POSITION_SERVO - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    PU port function: PU position servo.
    PU_FUNCTION_PU_SIMPLE_PWM - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    PU port function: PU simple PWM (default).
    PU_FUNCTION_PU_SPEED_SERVO - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    PU port function: PU speed servo.

    Q

    QUICK_DRIVE_BRAKE_CCW - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Quick Drive magnitude: brake (for direction 1).
    QUICK_DRIVE_BRAKE_CW - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Quick Drive magnitude: brake (for direction 0).
    QUICK_DRIVE_DIRECTION_MASK - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Bit mask for extracting the direction (bit 0) from a Quick Drive byte.
    QUICK_DRIVE_FULL_SPEED - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Quick Drive magnitude: full speed.
    QUICK_DRIVE_MAGNITUDE_MASK - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Bit mask for extracting the magnitude (bits 7–1) from a Quick Drive byte.
    QUICK_DRIVE_ZERO_SPEED - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Quick Drive magnitude: zero speed.

    R

    read(String, String) - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleConnection
    Reads the current value of the specified GATT characteristic.
    REMOTE_CONTROL_COMMANDS_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    UUID of the Remote Control Commands characteristic.
    REMOTE_CONTROL_SERVICE_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    UUID of the SBrick Remote Control GATT service.
    RESPONSE_AUTH_ERROR - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Response code: Authentication error.
    RESPONSE_AUTH_NEEDED - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Response code: Authentication needed.
    RESPONSE_INVALID_DATA_LENGTH - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Response code: Invalid data length.
    RESPONSE_INVALID_PARAMETER - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Response code: Invalid parameter.
    RESPONSE_NO_SUCH_COMMAND - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Response code: No such command.
    RESPONSE_SUCCESS - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Response code: Success.
    RESPONSE_THERMAL_PROTECTION - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Response code: Thermal protection active.
    RESPONSE_WRONG_STATE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick.SBrickProtocolConstants
    Response code: Wrong state.
    rssi() - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleDevice
    Returns the received signal strength indicator (RSSI) at the time the advertisement was received, in dBm.
    RX_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    UUID of the RX characteristic (notify).

    S

    SBrickProtocolConstants - Class in ch.varani.lego.ble.device.sbrick
    Constants for the SBrick BLE remote control protocol (Rev. 26, 2020-10-28).
    ScanCallback - Interface in ch.varani.lego.ble.api
    Receives BLE scan results as they are discovered.
    SIGN_FORWARD - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    Sign character for forward / positive direction.
    SIGN_REVERSE - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    Sign character for reverse / negative direction.
    startScan(ScanCallback) - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleScanner
    Starts a passive BLE scan and delivers discovered peripherals to the given callback.
    startScan(ScanCallback) - Method in class ch.varani.lego.ble.impl.macos.MacOsBleScanner
    Starts a passive BLE scan and delivers discovered peripherals to the given callback.
    startScan(String, ScanCallback) - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleScanner
    Starts a filtered BLE scan that only reports peripherals advertising the specified GATT service UUID.
    startScan(String, ScanCallback) - Method in class ch.varani.lego.ble.impl.macos.MacOsBleScanner
    Starts a filtered BLE scan that only reports peripherals advertising the specified GATT service UUID.
    STATUS_BATTERY_LEVEL_MASK - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Status byte mask for battery level (bits 4–3).
    STATUS_BATTERY_LEVEL_MASK - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Status byte mask for battery level (bits 4–3).
    STATUS_BATTERY_LEVEL_SHIFT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Status byte bit shift for battery level.
    STATUS_BATTERY_LEVEL_SHIFT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Status byte bit shift for battery level.
    STATUS_BLE_LONG_RANGE_BIT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Status byte bit: BLE long-range PHY active (bit 2).
    STATUS_CHARGING_BIT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Status byte bit: charging (bit 5).
    STATUS_CHARGING_BIT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Status byte bit: charging (bit 5).
    STATUS_ERROR_BIT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Status byte bit: error flag (bit 0).
    STATUS_ERROR_BIT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Status byte bit: error flag (bit 0).
    STATUS_MOTION_WAKE_BIT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Status byte bit: motion wake-up enabled (bit 1).
    STATUS_USB_CONNECTED_BIT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz2ProtocolConstants
    Status byte bit: USB connected (bit 6).
    STATUS_USB_CONNECTED_BIT - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    Status byte bit: USB connected (bit 6).
    stopScan() - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleScanner
    Stops the active scan.
    stopScan() - Method in class ch.varani.lego.ble.impl.macos.MacOsBleScanner
    Stops the active scan.

    T

    TX_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.circuitcubes.CircuitCubesProtocolConstants
    UUID of the TX characteristic (write-without-response).

    U

    UART_CH1_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    UART channel 1 characteristic (short UUID 0x3901) — Write + Notify.
    UART_CH2_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    UART channel 2 characteristic (short UUID 0x3902) — Write + Notify.
    UART_CH3_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    UART channel 3 characteristic (short UUID 0x3903) — Write + Notify.
    UART_CH4_CHARACTERISTIC_UUID - Static variable in class ch.varani.lego.ble.device.buwizz.BuWizz3ProtocolConstants
    UART channel 4 characteristic (short UUID 0x3904) — Write + Notify.

    W

    writeWithoutResponse(String, String, byte[]) - Method in interface ch.varani.lego.ble.api.BleConnection
    Writes a byte array to the specified GATT characteristic without waiting for a response from the peripheral (Write Without Response).
